body:
This pull request sets the compat entry for the `ClimaCore` package to `0.8`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
Note: Consider registering a new release of your package immediately after merging this PR, as downstream packages may depend on this for tests to pass.
title: CompatHelper: add new compat entry for ClimaCore at version 0.8, (keep existing compat)

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `Thermodynamics` package from `0.5` to `0.5, 0.6`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions `0.5`.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for Thermodynamics to 0.6, (keep existing compat)
